ticket_text: Hi, I'm Zainab Hussain. My power bank (order #4519) arrived damaged and I'd like a refund.
route_reasoning: The customer requests a refund for a damaged product, which involves money movement and policy considerations, so it requires human review before responding.

steps.reasoning: The customer requests a refund for a damaged product, which involves money movement and policy considerations, so it requires human review before responding.

result.note: Customer reported item arrived damaged; photo evidence on file.

results.title: Refund policy
results.content: Refunds are available within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging, or immediately for items that arrive damaged or defective regardless of the 30-day window (photo evidence required, already-noted damage reports on an order count as evidence). Refunds outside the 30-day window require a manager exception. All refunds must be approved by a human support agent before being issued, regardless of the reason. Approved refunds are credited to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

results.title: Damaged or defective item claims
results.content: If an item arrives damaged or defective, the customer may choose a free replacement or a full refund, regardless of the 30-day window, provided photo evidence is on file or the issue is visually obvious from the order notes. This does not require a manager exception, but the refund action itself still requires human approval before it is issued.

arguments.reason: Customer reported power bank arrived damaged; photo evidence on file.

final_output:
Hello Zainab, 

Thank you for reaching out. I see that your power bank order was reported as damaged upon arrival, and we have photo evidence on file. You are eligible for a full refund for this item. I have logged your refund request, and it is now pending human approval. Once approved, the refund will be credited to your original payment method within 5-7 business days.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please let me know!
